items.title: Billing behavior changed
items.body: Initial triage recorded a billing behavior change.

items.question: Should expired coupons preserve legacy discounts for existing carts?
items.why_it_matters: Without product intent, the reviewer cannot decide whether the changed billing behavior is a bug or an intended migration.
